'''zozachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nubilose|nubilose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nubilose|nubilose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zozachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozachithi|zozachithi]] || [[word:zozachiji|zozachiji]] || [[word:zozachishi|zozachishi]] || [[word:zozachiki|zozachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozachuthuthu|zozachuthuthu]] || [[word:zozachujuju|zozachujuju]] || [[word:zozachushushu|zozachushushu]] || [[word:zozachukuku|zozachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozachuthu|zozachuthu]] || [[word:zozachuju|zozachuju]] || [[word:zozachushu|zozachushu]] || [[word:zozachuku|zozachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozachufthuf|zozachufthuf]] || [[word:zozachufjuf|zozachufjuf]] || [[word:zozachufshuf|zozachufshuf]] || [[word:zozachufkuf|zozachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozachethe|zozachethe]] || [[word:zozacheje|zozacheje]] || [[word:zozacheshe|zozacheshe]] || [[word:zozacheke|zozacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozachothotho|zozachothotho]] || [[word:zozachojojo|zozachojojo]] || [[word:zozachoshosho|zozachoshosho]] || [[word:zozachokoko|zozachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozachotho|zozachotho]] || [[word:zozachojo|zozachojo]] || [[word:zozachosho|zozachosho]] || [[word:zozachoko|zozachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozachofthof|zozachofthof]] || [[word:zozachofjof|zozachofjof]] || [[word:zozachofshof|zozachofshof]] || [[word:zozachofkof|zozachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfthĂŻf|zozachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfjĂŻf|zozachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfshĂŻf|zozachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfkĂŻf|zozachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zozachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zozachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zozachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zozachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfthĂŻf|zozachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfjĂŻf|zozachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfshĂŻf|zozachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfkĂŻf|zozachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfthĂŻf|zozachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfjĂŻf|zozachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfshĂŻf|zozachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zozachĂŻfkĂŻf|zozachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozachĂŠthĂŠ|zozachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zozachĂŠjĂŠ|zozachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zozachĂŠshĂŠ|zozachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zozachĂŠkĂŠ|zozachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozachathatha|zozachathatha]] || [[word:zozachajaja|zozachajaja]] || [[word:zozachashasha|zozachashasha]] || [[word:zozachakaka|zozachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozachatha|zozachatha]] || [[word:zozachaja|zozachaja]] || [[word:zozachasha|zozachasha]] || [[word:zozachaka|zozachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozachafthaf|zozachafthaf]] || [[word:zozachafjaf|zozachafjaf]] || [[word:zozachafshaf|zozachafshaf]] || [[word:zozachafkaf|zozachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zozachasha|zozachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozachshĂ«sha|zozachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozachrosha|zozachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozachmusha|zozachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozachyasha|zozachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozachnkshĂ«sha|gozozachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozachnkrosha|gozozachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozachnkmusha|gozozachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozachnkyasha|gozozachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zozazachasha|zozazachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozazachshĂ«sha|zozazachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozazachrosha|zozazachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozazachmusha|zozazachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozazachyasha|zozazachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozazachnkshĂ«sha|gozozazachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozazachnkrosha|gozozazachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozazachnkmusha|gozozazachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozazachnkyasha|gozozazachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zezĂŠchasha|zezĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zezĂŠchshĂ«sha|zezĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zezĂŠchrosha|zezĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zezĂŠchmusha|zezĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zezĂŠchyasha|zezĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozezĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gozezĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozezĂŠchnkrosha|gozezĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozezĂŠchnkmusha|gozezĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozezĂŠchnkyasha|gozezĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zozfachasha|zozfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozfachshĂ«sha|zozfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozfachrosha|zozfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozfachmusha|zozfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozfachyasha|zozfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozfachnkshĂ«sha|gozozfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozfachnkrosha|gozozfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozfachnkmusha|gozozfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozfachnkyasha|gozozfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
